title: AIOCreate RPG
description: A fully optimized Create modpack designed for the ultimate survival experience, blending automation with adventure.
body:
## **The Ultimate Create RPG Experience**

> Embark on a fully immersive adventure where creativity meets RPG action. This modpack seamlessly integrates Create and its many extensions, enhancing automation and engineering possibilities while introducing dynamic RPG elements. Master new weapons, combat mechanics, and skill progression as you explore a world where innovation and adventure collide.

> As this is my first-ever modpack, I welcome your feedback! If you encounter any issues, please report them, and I'll work on fixes as soon as possible.

> ⚠️ Note: While the modpack has been tested, it hasn't been optimized for all system configurations. If you experience performance differences, feel free to share your insights in the Discord community.
